name: Leol
description: Leol (レオル, Reoru) was a Chimera Ant resembles an anthropomorphic lion. Before the death of the Chimera Ant Queen, he was known as Hagya (ハギャ, Hagya), and was one of the particularly disloyal squadron leaders. Leol's memories of his previous life are not that of a human's, but those of a lion. During Morel and Knov’s primary infiltration of the King's palace in East Gorteau, Leol faces Morel in combat. He assumes he is victorious after submerging Morel in an underground church using a stolen ability, but dies by asphyxiation due to a cunning strategy put into action by Morel.
